title: NetSuite connector (Public Preview)
body: You can now ingest data from the `NetSuite2.com` data source programmatically using the Databricks API, the Databricks CLI, or a Databricks notebook. See [Configure NetSuite for ingestion into Databricks](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/netsuite-source-setup).

ref_links.text: Configure NetSuite for ingestion into Databricks
